title: Probationary Contracts: Return to Probationary Status
description: Experienced teachers and other professional staff can be placed back on a probationary contract under certain circumstances, such as when they are rehired after a break in employment. Probationary status means an employee's contract can be reviewed more closely and may not be renewed at the end of the term. Understanding when this status applies helps the community know how the district manages its teaching staff and maintains accountability.
